case_title: HELIO MILHOMEM VS. CELIA'S RESTAURANT AND PIZZERIA AKA CELIA'S et al

ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR AN AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S REQUEST FOR THE ISSUANCE OF AN ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION PURSUANT TO CCP 674(C)(1) AND 680.135

NOTICE AND MOTION FOR THE ISSUANCE OF AN AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR THE ISSUANCE OF AN ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILHOMEM, HELIO HEARING SET FOR DEC-23-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF HELIO MILHOMEM'S MOTION FOR THE ISSUANCE OF AN AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR THE ISSUANCE OF AN ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF SERVED DEFENDANT AT THE SAN LEANDRO ADDRESS BUT MISTAKENLY INCLUDED THE ZIP CODE FOR A SAN FRANCISCO P.O. BOX. THE ZIP CODE FOR THE SAN LEANDRO PROPERTY IS 94577 AND THE PROOF OF SERVICE LISTS IT AS 94142. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; NOT REPORTED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MILHOMEM, HELIO

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF HELIO MILHOMEM'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO LATER THAN AUGUST 6, 2012, CELIA'S RESTAURANT AND PIZZERIA, AKA CELIA'S ITLANIA RESTAURANT, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP; YACOUB H. SALAMEH; AND DONIA M. ABDUL, AKA DONIA M. ABDULHADI, AKA DONIA ABDULHADI, BOTH AS INDIVIDUAL AND GENERAL PARTNER OF CELIA'S RESTAURANT AND PIZZERIA ARE TO FURNISH RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND PLAINTIFF'S POST JUDGMENT DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TANGIBLE THINGS. DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS TO THE MOVING PARTY IN THE SUM OF $340.00. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER, PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN; NOT REPORTED. = (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF HELIO MILHOMEM'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. No later than August 6, 2012, Celia's Restaurant and Pizzeria, AKA Celia's Itlania Restaurant, a General Partnership; Yacoub H. Salameh; and Donia M. Abdul, aka Donia M. Abdulhadi, aka Donia Abdulhadi, both as individual and general partner of Celia's Restaurant and Pizzeria are to furnish responses to Plaintiff's First Set of Post Judgment Interrogatories and Plaintiff's Post Judgment Demand for Production of Documents and Tangible Things. Defendants shall pay monetary sanctions to the moving party in the sum of $340.00. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER, Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported. = (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Issuance Of An Affidavit Of Identity In Support Of Pltf'S Req. For The Issuance Of An Abstract Of Judgment And Writ Of Execution; Declaration And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Zachary A. Toran of Zachary A. Toran Attorney at Law, (415-850-9067) appearing for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant.

Tentative Ruling is adopted - PLAINTIFF HELIO MILHOMEM's Motion For Issuance Of An Affidavit Of Identity In Support Of Pltf'S Req. For The Issuance Of An Abstract Of Judgment And Writ Of Execution is granted. Order signed in open court. Party stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. David McDonald Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =302/JPT

Notice And Motion For The Issuance Of An Affidavit Of Identity In Support Of Request For The Issuance Of An Abstract Of Judgment And Writ Of Execution
Off Calendar Dec-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HELIO MILHOMEM'S MOTION FOR THE ISSUANCE OF AN AFFIDAVIT OF IDENTITY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR THE ISSUANCE OF AN ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar. Plaintiff's proof of service is defective. Plaintiff served defendant at the San Leandro address but mistakenly included the zip code for a San Francisco P.O. Box. The zip code for the San Leandro property is 94577 and the proof of service lists it as 94142. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller; Not reported
